stmt: ∀ {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V] [Module ℂ V] (bc : BosonCore V) (n : ℕ), bc.number * bc.aDagger ^ n - bc.aDagger ^ n * bc.number = (↑n : ℂ) • bc.aDagger ^ n
∀ {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V] [Module ℂ V] (bc : BosonCore V) (n : ℕ), bc.number (bc.ket n) = (↑n : ℂ) • bc.ket n
∀ {V : Type*} [AddCommGroup V] [Module ℂ V] (bc : BosonCore V) (n : ℕ), bc.ket (n + 1) = 0 → bc.ket n = 0
∀ n : ℕ, BosonCore.polyBosonCore.ket n = Polynomial.X ^ n
